name: 15q21_3_TPM1_SD
description: Tropomyosin TPM1 at 15q22.2 sits in a cluster with neighbouring paralog footprints; the wider 15q21.3-q22.2 region contains intra-chromosomal SDs (5-30 kb at 93-97% identity) flanking SMAD3, SMAD6, and TPM1, contributing to rare intragenic events in Loeys-Dietz-spectrum probands.

architecture.internal_structure: 5-30 kb SD pairs at 93-97% identity flanking SMAD3 and TPM1; SMAD6 paralog footprint shared with chr6 SMAD-family loci.
